name: mobile-release-kit
description: Ship Expo/RN apps to the App Store & Play Store: screenshot capture, device-frame rendering, EAS release runbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Store screenshots, device frames, and EAS release for Expo/RN apps
interface.longDescription: Capture store screenshots (live simulator or web bundle), frame them into conversion-oriented marketing images at exact store sizes, and run the EAS build/submit release with the real gotchas handled.
